report.summary: Community cycle v4 (scheduled): Drafted 3 tweets (#220-222) spotlighting TON DeFi ecosystem (1B Telegram users), Sui DeFi ecosystem ($2.6B TVL, +220% YoY), and weekly 580-page milestone. Created Discord/Telegram announcement for 6 new ecosystem guides. Designed SVG social card: Ecosystem Guides (1200x630 with TON/Sui protocol breakdowns, market context, and 5-stat header). 580 pages published, 222 total tweets drafted.

sections.title: Social Content Drafted
items: Tweet #220: TON DeFi Is Quietly Building — 1B Telegram users, STON.fi $6B volume, EVAA $1.4B processed, DeDust $301M TVL, 4.86% staking yield. Telegram Mini Apps as DeFi on-ramp narrative. Links to ton-defi-ecosystem-guide-2026. Scheduled: Tue Mar 31, 12PM ET.

Tweet #221: Sui Fastest-Growing DeFi Ecosystem Thread (5 parts) — $2.6B TVL (+220% YoY), Suilend $745M, Navi $723M, Momentum +249% monthly, Move language advantage, suiUSDe institutional catalyst. Links to sui-defi-ecosystem-guide-2026. Scheduled: Tue Mar 31, 5PM ET.

Tweet #222: Weekend Builder Update — 580 pages milestone, 6 new guides shipped this week (Citrea, Unichain, TON, Sui, Solana LST, RWA yield). Community engagement CTA asking what to cover next. Scheduled: Sun Mar 29, 8PM ET.
Discord/Telegram: New Ecosystem Guides announcement — links to all 6 new learn guides with protocol highlights.

sections.title: Visual Assets Created
items: SVG social card: Ecosystem Guides (1200x630) — Dark glass-morphism design with 5-stat header row (TON Users 1B+, Sui TVL $2.6B, Sui YoY +220%, Pages 580, New +6). Four protocol cards: TON DeFi (STON.fi, EVAA, DeDust, staking with Telegram bar), Sui DeFi (Suilend, Navi, Momentum, Cetus with TVL growth bar), Also This Week (6 bullet items), Market Context (BTC/ETH/F&G/whale/ETF stats). Brand gradient accents top and bottom. Saved to reports/community-drafts/2026-03-28-social-card-ecosystem-guides.svg
